use_cases: Displaying status indicators like success, warning, or error states in application interfaces
Labeling products or items with categories, tags, or counts
Showing notification badges or indicators on navigation elements
Providing visual feedback in forms to indicate validation states or required fields
Highlighting featured content, promotions, or special offers in e-commerce contexts
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with multiple visual variants (primary, secondary, success, warning, info, destructive, outline) and appearance styles (default, light, outline, ghost). Features configurable sizes, disabled states, and icon support with accessibility-focused focus rings. Designed as a reusable UI primitive for displaying status indicators, labels, and notifications across SaaS, e-commerce, and general web applications.
